title: Number Of Rectangles That Can Form The Largest Square
titleCn: 可以形成最大正方形的矩形数目

testcases.input: rectangles = [[5,8],[3,9],[5,12],[16,5]] Output: 3 Explanation: The largest squares you can get from each rectangle are of lengths [5,3,5,5]. The largest possible square is of length 5, and you can get it out of 3 rectangles.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The largest squares you can get from each rectangle are of lengths [5,3,5,5]. The largest possible square is of length 5, and you can get it out of 3 rectangles.
